note: HARD STAGE 1 snowfield: white 單位移動 label on a bright background scores 0.764 raw TM_CCOEFF_NORMED, under the 0.80 element gate, so the controller read the screen as NOT_ACTIONABLE forever (2026-07-11 deadlock). Template was captured on a dark map (mean ~118) vs this map's ~188; fixed by the per-template highpass preprocess flag (0.893 highpass), which this case now pins.
